# Core Python stack
python
pip
biopython
cython
matplotlib
numpy
pandas
pypdf
reportlab
requests
scipy
sqlalchemy
statsmodels
tenacity
tqdm

# genegalleon bioinformatics core (intended to be cross-arch)
amas
blast
clipkit
diamond
# Keep unpinned to allow newer releases. Runtime stability is checked
# in container/scripts/ensure_generax_stable.sh with automatic fallback.
generax
grampa
hyphy
iqtree=3.*
jcvi
kallisto
mafft
meme
minimap2
mmseqs2
ntcard
orthofinder
oarfish
astral-tree
paml
pigz
racon
rnabloom
samtools
spades
pymol-open-source
corset
seqkit
sra-tools>=3
trimal

# Merged from former BUSCO-specific environment.
# NOTE: Trinity + jellyfish are currently excluded on arm64:
# - Trinity is not reliably solvable in the strict channel profile.
# - The available arm64 "jellyfish" package is Python-only and does not
#   provide the required jellyfish CLI binary.
# - OMArk/OMAmer are not currently solvable because bioconda omamer depends
#   on pysais, which is unavailable in this arm64 solver profile.
# BUSCO itself is installed from upstream git tag 6.0.0 via pip
# to avoid conda sepp/gsl solver conflicts.
hmmer
metaeuk
prodigal

# Installed from GitHub refs by
# container/scripts/ensure_kfuku52_tools_latest.sh
# (amalgkit auto-selects newer commit among master, kfdevel, and devel by default)
